---
pagetitle: "Concordance · many frameworks, one queryable graph"
toc: false
page-layout: article
---

::: {.hero}

# Many cybersecurity frameworks. One queryable graph.

::: {.lede}
Compare structure, density, and coverage across NICE, DCWF, ECSF, SFIA,
Cyber.org K-12, CSTA, CSEC2017, and DigComp 2.2. The differences each
framework was authored to express stay intact.
:::

::: {.cta-row}
[Why this exists](why.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Browse frameworks](frameworks/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

:::

## The same question, different answers

::: {.chart-subtitle}
Granularity per organizing unit, by design. The spread runs roughly
twelvefold across the corpus. It tracks what each framework was
authored to specify, not relative quality.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="density-legend">
  <span class="legend-item"><span class="swatch swatch-workforce"></span>Workforce</span>
  <span class="legend-item"><span class="swatch swatch-pedagogy"></span>Pedagogy</span>
</div>
<figure class="density-figure">
  <div class="density-chart">
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="workforce">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="US"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Workforce"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/nice-v2.html">NICE Framework v2</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 100%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">51.6</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="workforce">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="US"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Workforce"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/dcwf-v51.html">DCWF v5.1</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 77.1%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">39.8</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="workforce">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="EU"><use href="#icon-eu"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Workforce"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/ecsf-v1.html">ENISA ECSF</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 63.0%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">32.5</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="pedagogy" data-outlier>
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="US"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Pedagogy"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/csta-2017.html">CSTA K-12 CS</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 19.8%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">10.2</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="workforce">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Global"><use href="#icon-global"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Workforce"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/sfia-9.html">SFIA 9</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 10.9%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">5.6</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="pedagogy">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Global"><use href="#icon-global"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Pedagogy"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/csec2017.html">ACM/IEEE CSEC2017</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 9.7%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">5.0</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="pedagogy">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="US"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Pedagogy"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/cyberorg-k12.html">Cyber.org K-12</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 8.3%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">4.3</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="bar-row" data-type="pedagogy">
      <div class="bar-meta">
        <span class="bar-pictograms">
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="EU"><use href="#icon-eu"/></svg>
          <svg class="bar-icon" role="img" aria-label="Pedagogy"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg>
        </span>
        <a class="bar-name" href="frameworks/digcomp-22.html">DigComp 2.2</a>
      </div>
      <div class="bar-visual">
        <div class="bar-fill" style="width: 8.1%;"></div>
        <span class="bar-value">4.2</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <figcaption>Elements per top-level organizing unit, with examples included. Bar widths are scaled to the highest value (NICE, 51.6).</figcaption>
</figure>
```

::: {.column-margin}
NICE specifies tasks, knowledge statements, and skill statements per
work role. DigComp specifies competence areas designed for citizen
self-assessment. Different questions, different shapes.
:::

[See the full cross-framework analysis](queries/density-spread.qmd){.no-icon}.

## The frameworks at a glance

```{=html}
<div class="framework-grid">
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/nice-v2.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">US</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Workforce</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">NICE Framework v2</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 41 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 2,115</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/dcwf-v51.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">US</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Workforce</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">DCWF v5.1</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 74 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 2,945</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/ecsf-v1.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-eu"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">EU</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Workforce</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">ENISA ECSF</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 12 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 390</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/sfia-9.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-global"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Global</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-workforce"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Workforce</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">SFIA 9</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 147 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 830</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/cyberorg-k12.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">US</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Pedagogy</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">Cyber.org K-12</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 116 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 500</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/csta-2017.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-us"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">US</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Pedagogy</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">CSTA K-12 CS</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 25 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 254</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/csec2017.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-global"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Global</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Pedagogy</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">ACM/IEEE CSEC2017</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 8 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 40</span>
  </a>
  <a class="framework-card" href="frameworks/digcomp-22.html">
    <span class="pictograms">
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-eu"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">EU</span>
      </span>
      <span class="pictogram">
        <span class="pictogram-circle"><svg class="pictogram-icon" aria-hidden="true"><use href="#icon-pedagogy"/></svg></span>
        <span class="pictogram-label">Pedagogy</span>
      </span>
    </span>
    <span class="name">DigComp 2.2</span>
    <span class="stats"><span class="label">Units</span> 5 · <span class="label">Elements</span> 21</span>
  </a>
</div>
```

## What this is and isn't

::: {.callout-defensive role="note" aria-label="What this is and isn't"}

`cybedtools` is a comparison and querying layer over existing
cybersecurity workforce and learning frameworks. **When the package's
outputs disagree with a framework steward's own view of their framework,
the steward's view is correct.**

The package extends framework-based analysis. It gives researchers a
uniform query surface across heterogeneous artefacts. It does not
replace any framework, redistribute source text under more permissive
terms than the framework's own license, or rank frameworks against
each other.

:::
